conversations.prompt: I spend too much on photography and need to be smarter about it
How can I track my company's carbon footprint?
What data do I need to collect for Scope 1 and 2 emissions?
Create a project to audit our energy consumption across all offices
Can you help me set reduction targets for next year?
Create a dashboard mockup showing our emissions by category
Are there sustainability certifications we should pursue?
How can I organize my photo shoot schedule and deliverables?
Create a mood board layout for a cinematic portrait shoot
Set up a project for editing my wedding photos with timeline and milestones
Help me organize my sneaker collection photos by brand
Create a mood board layout for displaying sneaker photography
Set up a project to edit and tag 50 new sneaker photos this week
What's the best lighting setup for photographing sneakers indoors?
